Data files copied to FUSE workspace for workspace-sync rescue. HTML (docs/index.html) is NOT workspace-sync-eligible (git-owned, workspace-sync NEVER_PUSH direction). ISS-2063 remains open until HTML reaches GitHub Pages.
internal_issues.push_failure_note: Persistent 403 — commit authored as steve/russelst@melrosecastle.com but GitHub still returns Permission denied to Devilwench. PAT appears valid for data-file rescue path via workspace-sync.

Unit-citation error in SEC-6.14 vise paragraph: '±2 µGal per-station uncertainty bands the dome publishes' — dome publishes ±1.0-2.6 nT (magnetic), not µGal. Patch applied: replaced with '±1.2 µGal per-station uncertainty bands (propagating the dome's ±2 nT magnetic bands through κ=1.677 nT/µGal)'. Conclusion (8.94 < 10, within ±1.2) still holds.
